description: Per-app and per-call-type model routing. When a client sends model: auto, GP checks this config before falling back to the tier's default_model. Edit via the admin dashboard Configs tab.

_schema.routes.<app_id>.<call_type>: provider/model — override for this app + call_type combo
_schema.routes.<app_id>.default: provider/model — fallback for this app when call_type has no specific route. null = use tier default.
